body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Use box domain in global simulations

This allows us to space coordinate points at equal intervals in lat/lon, which minimizes regridding bias when using Nearest neighbor interpolation of the forcing and when comparing to equispaced data.

title: Regular grid global simulations
